name: strangle vine
desc:
The strangle vine is a large bulbous plant with several writhing vines
sprouting from it. It moves slowly about on gnarled roots.

name: white orchid
desc:
The white orchid stands about two feet tall, moving around on its thin
tendrils.

name: pink orchid
desc:
The pink orchid stands about three feet tall, moving around on its thin
tendrils.

name: red orchid
desc:
The red orchid stands over three feet tall, moving around on its thin
tendrils.

name: yellow orchid
desc:
The yellow orchid stands about four feet tall, moving around on its thin
tendrils.

name: black orchid
desc:
The black orchid stands over four feet tall, moving around on its sticky
tendrils.

name: constrictor ivy
desc:
The constrictor ivy is a long snake-like vine, slithering about in search
of food.

name: carrion creeper
desc:
The carrion creeper is a knotted mass of thorny vines which writhes about
chaotically. You detect the fetid odor of rotting flesh, and notice several
small animal carcasses tangled within this vile aberration.

name: reaper shrub
desc:
The reaper shrub is a squat thorny plant, moving slowly about on thick
gnarled roots. Its spiney branches rustle ominously at your presence.

name: huge rat
desc:
The huge rat resembles rats you've seen before, except that it is about two
feet tall at the shoulder, and seems much more aggressive.

name: imp
desc:
The imp is a tiny humanoid with pointed ears and bright red skin. It stands
just over two feet in height and is armed with %s %s.

name: female kobold
desc:
The kobold is a small humanoid with doglike facial features and is covered
with coarse body hair. She stands just over three feet in height, is
wearing a filthy tunic, and is armed with %s %s.

name: kobold
desc:
The kobold is a small humanoid with doglike facial features and is covered
with coarse body hair. He stands just under four feet in height, is wearing
a filthy tunic, and is armed with %s %s.

name: female orc
desc:
The orc is a smallish humanoid with piglike facial features and is covered
sparsely by coarse body hair. She stands just over four feet in height, is
wearing a leather tunic, and is armed with %s %s.

name: orc
desc:
The orc is a smallish humanoid with piglike facial features and is covered
sparsely by coarse body hair. He stands just under five feet in height, is
wearing a leather cuirass, and is armed with %s %s.

name: skeleton warrior
desc:
The skeleton warrior is wearing tattered armor and mouldering bits of old
clothing, and is armed with %s %s.

name: giant scorpion
desc:
The giant scorpion resembles a common scorpion, except that it is over
eight feet in length.

name: zombie
desc:
The zombie has a blank expression on its face. It is wearing old soiled
clothing, and is armed with %s %s.

name: huge toad
desc:
The huge toad resembles a common toad, except that it is just over three
feet tall, and seems very agressive.

name: giant slug
desc:
The giant slug is over seven feet long and drools acidic spittle from its
maw.

name: giant bat
desc:
The giant bat has a wingspan of over twelve feet and has wicked looking
claws and teeth.

name: lesser demoness
desc:
The lesser demoness is a spindly bipedal humanoid with light yellowish skin
and wicked claws and teeth. She stands about five feet tall and fixes you
with a baleful stare.

name: lesser demon
desc:
The lesser demon is a spindly bipedal humanoid with dark yellowish skin and
wicked claws and teeth. He stands about five feet tall and fixes you with a
baleful stare.

name: shade
desc:
The shade is a dark shadowy figure. You can tell very little about it
except that its eyes strongly resemble burning coals. It occasionally emits
a low moan and watches your movements closely.

name: giant spider
desc:
The giant spider's body is over six feet long, and it has thick hairy legs.
A thick oily liquid drips from its mandibles.

name: ram
desc: The ram glares at you from beneath a pair of huge curved horns.

name: fire beetle
desc:
The fire beetle is a huge reddish brown beetle, about four feet long, with
a thick shiny carapace, and strong, wickedly sharp mandibles.

name: alligator
desc: The alligator watches your every move closely and snaps at you.

name: giant asp
desc:
The giant asp is an enormous viper over twenty feet in length. Its scales
are a dull tan and it's body is thicker than a large man's arm.

name: anaconda
desc:
The anaconda is an enormous constrictor snake well over forty feet in
length. Its scales range in color from an emerald green to a dark blue, and
its body is thicker than some tree trunks you've seen.

name: lizard woman
desc:
The lizard woman is a five foot tall bipedal humanoid who's features
resemble those of a large lizard. She has greyish scaley skin, and sharp
claws and teeth. The lizard woman is armed with %s %s.

name: lizard man
desc:
The lizard man is a six foot tall bipedal humanoid who's features resemble
those of a large lizard. He has greenish scaley skin, and sharp claws and
teeth. The lizard man is armed with %s %s.

name: black bear
desc:
The black bear has shaggy black fur run through with reddish brown streaks
and stands well over four feet tall at the shoulder.

name: red bear
desc:
The red bear has shaggy reddish fur run through with black streaks and
stands just over five feet tall at the shoulder.

name: female gnoll
desc:
The gnoll is a tall humanoid with hyenalike facial features and is covered
by thick golden brown body hair. She stands just over six feet in height,
is wearing a leather cuirass and trousers, and is armed with %s %s.

name: gnoll
desc:
The gnoll is a tall humanoid with hyenalike facial features and is covered
by thick reddish brown body hair. He stands just under seven feet in
height, is wearing a chainmail shirt and trousers, and is armed with %s %s.

name: female hobgoblin
desc:
The hobgoblin is a squat apelike humanoid with dark skin and pointed ears.
She stands just under five feet tall, is wearing a leather cuirass, and is
armed with %s %s.

name: hobgoblin
desc:
The hobgoblin is a squat apelike humanoid with dark skin and pointed ears.
He stands just over five feet tall, is wearing a leather cuirass, and is
armed with %s %s.

name: female brigand
desc:
The brigand has the look of a common thief, and is dressed in a cheap, but
flashy outfit. She is also wearing leather armor and is armed with %s %s.

name: brigand
desc:
The brigand has the look of a common thief, and is dressed in a cheap, but
flashy outfit. He is also wearing chain armor and is armed with %s %s.

name: leopard
desc:
The leopard has luxurious looking spotted fur. It growls menacingly and
bares its teeth at you.

name: wolf
desc:
The wolf is very large and has greyish fur and icey blue eyes. It growls at
you menacingly and bares its teeth.

name: wild boar
desc:
The wild boar has dark coarse hair and makes a low whining sound. It has
two sharp tusks which curve upwards from the sides of its mouth.

name: cave bear
desc:
The cave bear has dark brown fur and stands well over seven feet tall at
the shoulder. Its teeth and claws gleam like daggers as it sizes you up.

name: female barbarian
desc:
The barbarian is dressed in the hides of furred animals, and is armed with
%s %s. She has a look of great strength and cunning.

name: barbarian
desc:
The barbarian is dressed in the hides of furred animals, and is armed with
%s %s. He has a look of great strength and cunning.

name: female centaur
desc:
The centaur has the body of a horse with the upper torso, arms, and head of
a well built woman. She has long hair which she wears in a tight braid, and
is armed with %s %s.

name: centaur
desc:
The centaur has the body of a horse with the upper torso, arms, and head of
a well muscled man. He has long hair which he wears in a tight braid, and
is armed with %s %s.

name: mountain ape
desc:
The mountain ape is nearly seven feet tall, has thick reddish brown fur and
looks very strong.

name: female satyr
desc:
The satyr has the upper torso of well built woman, and the lower torso,
legs, and hooves of a goat. She is armed with %s %s.

name: satyr
desc:
The satyr has the upper torso of man with a lot of body hair, and the lower
torso, legs, and hooves of a goat. He is armed with %s %s.

name: female minotaur
desc:
The minotaur has the upper torso of a muscular woman, and the head, legs,
and hooves of a bull. She is wearing ringmail armor, and is armed with %s
%s.

name: minotaur
desc:
The minotaur has the upper torso of a muscular man, and the head, legs, and
hooves of a bull. He is wearing ringmail armor, and is armed with %s %s.

name: carrion crane
desc:
The carrion crane is nearly eight feet tall, has dull grey plumage and a
very wicked looking hooked ebony beak.

name: ogress
desc:
The ogress resembles an enormous and very ugly woman. She stands over seven
feet tall and is very muscular. Her clothing is filthy and poorly made. She
is armed with %s %s.

name: ogre
desc:
The ogre resembles an enormous and very ugly man. He stands over eight feet
tall and is very muscular. His clothing is filthy and poorly made. He is
armed with %s %s.

name: swordswoman
desc:
The swordswoman has an air of confidance about her. She is wearing chain
armor, and is armed with a rapier which she wields skillfully.

name: swordsman
desc:
The swordsman has an air of confidance about him. He is wearing chain
armor, and is armed with a rapier which he wields skillfully.

name: female cyclops
desc:
The cyclops resembles a very large woman with only one eye in the center of
her forehead. She stands over eleven feet tall, and is armed with a spiked
club.

name: cyclops
desc:
The cyclops resembles a very large man with only one eye in the center of
his forehead. He stands over twelve feet tall, and is armed with a spiked
club.

name: wraith
desc:
The wraith is a shadowy figure with faded, nondescript features. It is
semi-transparent and greyish in color. It glares at you with dull
yellowish eyes.

name: larochess
desc:
The larochess resembles a large well built woman with pale bluish skin
pointed ears, and a short tail. She is very muscular and stands nearly nine
feet tall. She is wearing leather armor, and is armed with a wicked spear.

name: larochet
desc:
The larochet resembles a large well built man with dark bluish skin,
pointed ears, and a short tail. He is very muscular and stands over nine
feet tall. He is wearing a cuirass, and is armed with a wicked spear.

name: cave lion
desc:
The cave lion is a huge black animal which stands over six feet tall at the
shoulder and has wicked curved claws and razor sharp teeth.

name: female troll
desc:
The troll resembles a large ugly woman with yellowish green skin and wicked
claws. Her skin is covered with warts and tufts of stiff greenish hair.

name: troll
desc:
The troll resembles a large ugly man with brownish green skin and wicked
claws. His skin is covered with warts and tufts of stiff greenish hair.

name: skeleton lord
desc:
The skeleton lord wears a suit well kept chainmail armor, and is armed with
%s %s.

name: griffon
desc:
The griffon has the body of a lion, and the front feet, head, and wings of
an eagle. It has razor sharp talons and a large black beak.

name: ghoul
desc:
The ghoul is a lithe, though muscular humanoid with tightly drawn brownish
flesh and cloven hooves. Its teeth and nails are yellowish and look very
sharp.

name: gargoyle
desc:
The gargoyle is a heavily muscled, grey skinned humanoid with large
leathery wings and wicked claws.

name: magmaman
desc:
The magmaman resembles a humanoid non-descript creature, seemingly formed
from molten rock. He has two thick arm-like appendages, ending in dripping
claws.

name: ogress mage
desc:
The ogress mage is wearing a steel breastplate and bracers, and is armed
with %s %s. She is also wearing a dark red cloak.

name: ogre mage
desc:
The ogre mage is wearing a steel breastplate and bracers, and is armed with
%s %s. He is also wearing a dark red cloak.

name: sand worm
desc:
The sand worm is over fifty feet long, is covered in a hard ringed
carapace, it's gaping maw is filled with many rows of wickedly gleaming
teeth.

name: chimera
desc:
The chimera has the body of a lion, leathery wings and two heads which
resemble those of a dragon. Thin streams of smoke curl upwards from its
nostrils.

name: warlock
desc:
The warlock is dressed in red robes and radiates power. He wields a staff
shrouded in magical flame. Tatooed on his right forearm is a crimson sigil.

name: minotaur chieftain
desc:
The minotaur chieftain is a very large member of his species. He is very
muscular and stands nearly eight feet tall. He is wearing scalemail armor,
and is armed with %s %s.

name: stone giantess
desc:
The stone giantess resembles a huge hairless woman with light greyish skin
and stands nearly eighteen feet tall. She is armed with a huge club.

name: stone giant
desc:
The stone giant resembles a huge hairless man with dark greyish skin and
stands nearly twenty feet tall. He is armed with a huge club.

name: elysian dragon
desc:
The elysian dragon has metalic sky blue scales which glisten in the light.
Its powerful wings span some eighty feet and it is over fifty feet in
length.

name: hydra
desc: The hydra resembles a small wingless dragon with three heads.

name: female affreet
desc:
The affreet resembles a huge horned woman with reddish skin and stands well
over eighteen feet tall. She is armed with a greatsword that glows dull
red.

name: affreet
desc:
The affreet resembles a huge horned man with reddish skin and stands well
over twenty feet tall. He is armed with a greatsword that glows dull red.

name: magma worm
desc:
The magma worm is over seventy feet long, is covered in a hard ringed
carapace that glows a dull reddish color, and it's gaping maw is filled
with many rows of wicked teeth.

name: stygian dragon
desc:
The stygian dragon has dull brown scales and is without wings. It is well
over eighty feet in length. Its talons are as large and probably as sharp
as a sword.

name: ice giantess
desc:
The ice giantess resembles a huge woman with bone white skin, and long
flowing white hair. She stands over nineteen feet tall, and is armed with a
huge crystaline sword.

name: ice giant
desc:
The ice giant resembles a huge man with bone white skin, white hair, and a
long white beard. He stands over twenty feet tall, and is armed with a huge
crystaline sword.

name: octopod
desc:
The octopod is a huge dark green bulbus plant standing nearly five feet
tall, and has eight rubbery greenish tentacles.

name: skeleton giant
desc:
The skeleton giant stands nearly twenty feet tall, is armed with a bone
hammer, and is wearing an enormous suit of tattered chainmail.

name: greater demoness
desc:
The greater demoness emanates power and malevolence. She has bright blue
skin and stands over eight feet tall. She wields a flaming greatsword and
wears an armband engraved with runes.

name: greater demon
desc:
The greater demon emanates power and malevolence. He has dull blue skin and
stands over nine feet tall. He wields a flaming greatsword and wears an
armband engraved with runes.

name: sorceress
desc:
The sorceress is dressed in indigo robes and radiates power. She wields a
rod tipped with magical frost. Inscribed on her forehead is a blue rune.

name: sorceror
desc:
The sorceror is dressed in indigo robes and radiates power. He wields a rod
shrouded with magical flame. Inscribed on his forehead is a violet rune.

name: apollyon dragon
desc:
The apollyon dragon has crimson scales and powerful leathery wings. It is
without a doubt one of the most enormous creatures you have ever seen,
being well over one hundred feet in length. Its talons and teeth are jet
black, and smoke curls upwards from its nostrils.

name: flame giantess
desc:
The flame giantess resembles a huge woman with ruddy skin and bright red
hair. She stands over twenty five feet tall, is armed with a great axe made
of a dull black metal, and wears dragonscale armor. She reguards you
malignly with her smouldering red eyes, and smiles cruely.

name: flame giant
desc:
The flame giant resembles a huge man with ruddy skin, bright red hair, and
a coarse red beard. He stands nearly thirty feet tall, is armed with a
great axe made of a dull black metal, and wears dragonscale armor. He
regards you malevolently with his smouldering red eyes, and grins wickedly.

name: flame giant warlord
desc:
The flame giant resembles a huge man with ruddy skin, bright red hair, and
a coarse red beard. He stands nearly thirty feet tall, is armed with a
great spear made of a dark black metal that glows with a dull reddish light
at the head. He wears armor of fine workmanship made from overlapping
scales of a dark metallic blue. You sense great wisdom in his stern gaze.

name: balneal dragon
desc:
The balneal dragon has silvery blue scales and a powerfully built
serpentine body. It is over one hundred fifty feet in length. Its talons
and teeth are of a clear bluish crystaline substance, and steam rises from
its nostrils.

name: arch demoness
desc:
The arch demoness emanates awesome power and malevolence. She has bright
red skin and stands over twelve feet tall. She wields a glowing bardiche
and wears an armband engraved with runes.

name: arch demon
desc:
The arch demon emanates awesome power and malevolence. He has dull blue
skin and stands over fifteen feet tall. He wields a glowing bardiche and
wears an armband engraved with runes.

name: demon king
desc:
The demon king emanates incredible power and horrific malevolence. He has
dull black skin and stands over thirty feet tall. He wields a huge glowing
sabre nearly fifteen feet long and wears a dull grey crown engraved with
runes.

name: great dragon
desc:
The great dragon has greyish scales and powerful leathery wings. It is
without a doubt the most enormous creature you have ever seen, being well
over two hundred feet in length. Its talons and teeth are yellowish white,
and smoke curls upward from its nostrils as it regards you with amusement.

name: white rabbit
desc: The white rabbit is large and fluffy with floppy ears and big brown eyes.

name: black rabbit
desc: The black rabbit is large and fluffy with floppy ears and big brown eyes.

name: pink bunny
desc: The pink bunny is small and fluffy with perky ears and big blue eyes.

name: lizard
desc: The lizard is small and brown and moves very quickly.

name: monkey
desc: The monkey is quick and playful and watches you warily.

name: owl
desc: The owl is perched in a nearby tree watching you intently.

name: squirrel
desc: The squirrel sits in a nearby tree and chitters at you.

name: frog
desc: The frog is small and green and appears to be a good jumper.

name: lizard
desc: The lizard is small and purple and moves very quickly.

name: fox
desc: The fox hides in the nearby brush and seems very skittish.

name: hyena
desc:
The hyena looks ravenous and extremely viscious. It snarls menacingly
and bares its teeth at you.

name: tiger
desc:
The tiger has luxurious looking striped fur. It growls menacingly and
bares its teeth at you.

name: mountain lion
desc:
The mountain lion has dark brown spotted fur. It growls menacingly and
bares its teeth at you.

name: female nomad
desc:
The nomad has dark skin and the look of someone hardened by the harsh
environment in which she lives. She is wearing dark linen clothing and is
armed with a scimitar.

name: nomad
desc:
The nomad has dark skin and the look of someone hardened by the harsh
environment in which he lives. He is wearing dark linen clothing and is
armed with a scimitar.

name: female bandit
desc:
The bandit has the look of an accomplished rogue, and is dressed in an
expensive silk tunic and pants of a rich red color. She is also wearing a
chainmail jerkin and is armed with a wicked looking sabre.

name: bandit
desc:
The bandit has the look of an accomplished rogue, and is dressed in an
expensive silk tunic and pants of a deep blue color. He is also wearing a
chainmail jerkin and is armed with a wicked looking sabre.

name: forest giantess
desc:
The forest giantess resembles a huge woman with brown skin and stands nearly
fifteen feet tall. Her clothing is of woven vines and leaves. She is armed
with a huge spear.

name: forest giant
desc:
The forest giant resembles a huge man with dark brown skin and stands nearly
eighteen feet tall. His clothing is of woven vines and leaves. He is armed
with a huge spear.

name: jackal
desc:
The jackal looks extremely viscious. It snarls menacingly and bares
its teeth at you.

name: ice elemental
desc: The ice elemental is a titanic humanoid formed of ice.

name: flame elemental
desc: The flame elemental is a titanic humanoid formed of flame.

name: stone elemental
desc: The stone elemental is a titanic humanoid formed of stone.

name: mystic knight
desc:
The mystic knight has the look of a well seasoned warrior who has seen
many a battle in his time. His gear and clothing are the finest available. He
is wearing glowing dragonscale armor and wielding a jeweled claymore. Somehow
you are aware that he could easily defeat you.

name: orc warrior
desc:
The orc warrior is a smallish humanoid with piglike facial features and
is covered sparsely by coarse body hair. He stands just over five feet in
height, is wearing chainmail armor, and is armed with %s %s.

name: orc subchief
desc:
The orc subchief is a smallish humanoid with piglike facial features and
is covered sparsely by coarse body hair. He stands over five feet in height,
is wearing chainmail armor, and is armed with %s %s.

name: orc chieftain
desc:
The orc chieftain is a smallish humanoid with piglike facial features and
is covered sparsely by coarse body hair. He stands well over five feet in
height, is wearing chainmail armor, and is armed with %s %s.

name: orc shaman
desc:
The orc shaman is a smallish humanoid with piglike facial features and
is covered sparsely by coarse body hair. She stands just under five feet in
height, is wearing robes, and is armed with %s %s.

name: orc warlord
desc:
The orc warlord is an average sized humanoid with piglike facial features
and is covered sparsely by coarse body hair. He stands just under six feet
in height, is wearing gleaming chainmail armor, and is armed with %s %s.

name: gnoll warrior
desc:
The gnoll warrior is a tall humanoid with hyenalike facial features and is
covered by thick reddish brown body hair. He stands just under seven feet in
height, is wearing chainmail armor, and is armed with %s %s.

name: gnoll subchief
desc:
The gnoll subchief is a tall humanoid with hyenalike facial features and is
covered by thick reddish brown body hair. He stands just over seven feet in
height, is wearing scalemail armor, and is armed with %s %s.

name: gnoll chieftain
desc:
The gnoll chieftain is a tall humanoid with hyenalike facial features and is
covered by thick reddish brown body hair. He stands just over seven feet in
height, is wearing scalemail armor, and is armed with %s %s.

name: gnoll warlord
desc:
The gnoll warlord is a tall humanoid with hyenalike facial features and is
covered by thick reddish brown body hair. He stands well over seven feet in
height, is wearing gleaming bandmail armor, and is armed with %s %s.

name: gnoll shaman
desc:
The gnoll shaman is a tall humanoid with hyenalike facial features and
is covered by thick golden brown body hair. She stands just over six feet in
height, is wearing robes, and is armed with %s %s.

name: lizard warrior
desc:
The lizard warrior is a six foot tall bipedal humanoid who's features
resemble those of a large lizard. He has greenish scaley skin, and sharp
claws and teeth. He is armed with %s %s.

name: lizard subchief
desc:
The lizard subchief is a six foot tall bipedal humanoid who's features
resemble those of a large lizard. He has greenish scaley skin, and sharp
claws and teeth. He is armed with %s %s.

name: lizard chieftain
desc:
The lizard chieftain is a six foot tall bipedal humanoid who's features
resemble those of a large lizard. He has greenish scaley skin, and sharp
claws and teeth. He is wearing ringmail armor and is armed with %s %s.

name: lizard warlord
desc:
The lizard warlord is a six foot tall bipedal humanoid who's features
resemble those of a large lizard. He has greenish scaley skin, and sharp
claws and teeth. He is wearing scalemail armor and is armed with %s %s.

name: lizard shaman
desc:
The lizard shaman is a five foot tall bipedal humanoid who's features
resemble those of a large lizard. She has greyish scaley skin, and sharp
claws and teeth. She is wearing robes and is armed with %s %s.

name: stone warrior
desc: The stone warrior is skillfully crafted and resembles a heavily muscled warrior in full plate armor and stands nearly twenty feet high. It is armed with a huge stone axe.

name: stone scorpion
desc: The stone scorpion is skillfully crafted and resembles a common scorpion, except that it is nearly twenty feet in length and it's carapace has the color and texture of stone.

name: stone wizard
desc: The stone wizard is skillfully crafted and resembles a gaunt sorceror in flowing robes covered with runes and sigils. It is armed with a stone sceptre topped with a glowing crystal and stands nearly twenty feet high.

name: dwarven guard
desc: The guard is of obvious dwarven blood. He looks very tough and battle hardened. He wears scale mail armor of a design you're unfamiliar with and wields a battleax.

name: elite dwarven guard
desc: This guard closely resembles his lesser brethren, however his equipment is of a finer quality and he appears more agressive and well disciplined. He wears brushed steel scale mail armor and wields a huge battleax engraved with runes along the edge of the blade.

name: dwarven captain
desc: This grim warrior appears to have seen more than his share of battle, and seems utterly fearless. His dwarven mail is of fine quality and each scale has finely engraved runic designs. He wields a battleax with a haft easily four feet long and a blade blacker than night.

name: dwarven sorceror
desc: The dwarven sorceror has an obvious callousness about his expression, and appears no one to be trifled with. He radiates confidence and power. He wears robes of a deep reddish brown, similar to the hue of the stone in the walls of his home. He carries a black sceptre topped with some sort of softly glowing crystal.

name: dwarven warhound
desc: The dwarven warhound is a huge beast, nearly four feet at the shoulder. It resembles  a wolf with glossy black fur. Its eyes and teeth are crimson. Its hackles raise and it snarls menacingly as you look its way.

name: dwarven leutenant
desc: This dwarven officer wears scale armor of the finest quality and brandishes a huge battleaxe of fine make with an extraordinarily keen edge. He seems very dignified and confidant.

name: dwarven warlord
desc: This ruthless dwarven battle chief is dressed in heavy scale armor made of a dull bluish metal that seems to absorb light. The weapon in his hands is an enormous battleax with a haft of dark grey wood and a head forged of the same strange metal as his armor. Dimly glowing runes adorn the head of his axe along the edges of the blades.

name: smith
desc: This dwarven smith is heavily muscled, his leather apron smeared with sweat and soot. He is very alert and has an expression of great calm and peace of mind. His eyes harden as he notices your intense stare, and he hefts the weight of his great hammer.

name: master smith
desc: This older dwarf is gnarled and bulging with muscle. His leathers smeared with grime and sweat. He seems very calm and at one with his surrounds. The great hammer he cradles in his arms is forged of a dull bluish metal, and almost seems to glow dimly.

name: dwarven archmage
desc: The dwarven archmage has an obvious callousness about his expression, and appears no one to be trifled with. He radiates incredible power. He wears robes of a deep purple hue. He carries a black sceptre topped with some sort of brightly glowing crystal.

name: hellhound
desc:
The hellhound is a large wolf-type creature that dwells in the
firey depths of the volcano.  It glares at you with devilish red
eyes, mentally feeding you to its young.  It moves with a certain
strut that airs its pride and seems to taunt you with its vicious
grin.

name: magma slug
desc:
The magma slug is a gigantic slug that is covered in magma.  Its
maw rumbles with fury as it looks to burn you alive with its own magma.

name: elven scout
desc:
The elven scout peers at you through its forest green eyes.  The
stripes painted on his face warn you that he has come across and slain
many an unexpecting traveller.  Your doom awaits.

name: female elf
desc:
Despite being female, this elf resembles a modern-day war machine.
She moves blindingly fast, striking at any possible moment.  Though a
good fight is her forte, she is also amazingly beautiful, as female
elves always seem to be.

name: elven warrior
desc:
This elven warrior is built like a tree, and oddly enough blends
in with the trees as well, a warrior of a stealthy sort.  He wields
an axe that must have been crafted by the dwarves and enchanted by the
high elves.  He is certainly a force to be reckoned with.

name: elven champion
desc:
This elven champion is built like a mountain.  There seems to be
no escape from this warrior of warriors, a man's man -- only an elf.
He wields a great sword that shines like the moons on a good night.
Only the most powerful elves can craft such a beast.

name: elven warlord
desc:
This elven warlord is about to knock some sense into you with his
warhammer.  His evil eyes seem to hypnotize you into giving in to your
imminent death.
